name: Import Select POP
description: The Import Select POP is used to import and load the geometry types primitives defined in [[USD COMP]] and [[FBX COMP]]. It essentially loads any geometry type that [[USD COMP]] or [[FBX COMP]] can support such as a Mesh, Points, NURBS Curves or Patches, Basis Curves. Each geometry represents one primitive from the loading file or it can be a set of primitives merged together for better performance. Where the geometry primitive types are not supportable by POPs, that are converted to triangles, quads, line strips and point primitives. In [[USD COMP]] and [[FBX COMP]] if the Import Select POP renders merged geometries, an [[Info DAT]] operator is created next to this POP which represents the original paths of primitives within/from importing file, which can be useful for user to checkout what geometry the current POP is made of. Import Select POP can have its own animation controls within the Playback page or use the settings from its parent COMP. The imported geometry is loaded directly to the GPU.

parameters.name: Import Parent
parameters.label: Import Parent
parameters.description: Specify the import parent (eg. USD/FBX COMP) to search for the asset. When no COMP is specified it will by default search in the first import parent in its path.

parameters.name: Geo Path
parameters.label: Geo Path
parameters.description: The geometry path from the imported file.

parameters.name: Reload
parameters.label: Reload
parameters.description: Re-import and load the geometry.

parameters.name: Blend Shape
parameters.label: Blend Shape
parameters.description: Specifies the blend shape name (if any is specified) from the importing file that this POP will load.

parameters.name: Compute Tangents
parameters.label: Compute Tangents
parameters.description: Whether to compute tangents.

parameters.name: Use Parent Animation
parameters.label: Use Parent Animation
parameters.description: Enable using the parent COMP animation controls

parameters.name: Shift Animation Start
parameters.label: Shift Animation Start
parameters.description: A toggle to specify whether to shift the animation to the start of animation indicated in the importing file.

parameters.name: Sample Rate Mode
parameters.label: Sample Rate Mode
parameters.description: Sets the sample rate source.

parameters.name: Sample Rate
parameters.label: Sample Rate
parameters.description: Sets the custom sample rate.

parameters.name: Play Mode
parameters.label: Play Mode
parameters.description: Pause or play the geometry animation.

parameters.name: Initialize
parameters.label: Initialize
parameters.description: Resets the animation to its initial state.

parameters.name: Start
parameters.label: Start
parameters.description: Start playback of animation sequence.

parameters.name: Cue
parameters.label: Cue
parameters.description: A toggle to jump to Cue Point when it is set to ON and it stays at that position. Only available when Play Mode is Sequential.

parameters.name: Cue Point
parameters.label: Cue Point
parameters.description: Set any index in the animation as a point to jump to.

parameters.name: Play
parameters.label: Play
parameters.description: Enable playback.

parameters.name: Index
parameters.label: Index
parameters.description: This parameter explicitly sets the animation position when Play Mode is set to Specify Index. The units’ menu on the right lets you specify the index in the following units: Index, Frames, Seconds, and Fraction (percentage).

parameters.name: Speed
parameters.label: Speed
parameters.description: Playback speed.

parameters.name: Trim
parameters.label: Trim
parameters.description: Enable the Trim Start and Trim End parameters.

parameters.name: Trim Start
parameters.label: Trim Start
parameters.description: The time to consider the starting time of 0.

parameters.name: Trim End
parameters.label: Trim End
parameters.description: TTGrime the end of the animation.

parameters.name: Extend Left
parameters.label: Extend Left
parameters.description: Determines how the parent COMP handles animation positions that lie before the Trim Start position.

parameters.name: Extend Right
parameters.label: Extend Right
parameters.description: Determines how the parent COMP handles animation positions that lie after the Trim End position.

_provenance.fact: parameters and description scraped from the live Import_Select_POP wiki page ({{Parameter}}/{{ParameterItem}} templates)
